# Create simple colored square PNGs as fallback for older devices

# For each density, create a simple PNG using python
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import struct, zlib

def create_png(width, height, color):
    """Create a simple solid color PNG"""
    def chunk(ctype, data):
        c = ctype + data
        return struct.pack('>I', len(data)) + c + struct.pack('>I', zlib.crc32(c) & 0xFFFFFFFF)
    
    sig = b'\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n'
    ihdr = chunk(b'IHDR', struct.pack('>IIBBBBB', width, height, 8, 2, 0, 0, 0))
    
    raw = b''
    for y in range(height):
        raw += b'\x00'  # filter none
        for x in range(width):
            raw += bytes(color)
    
    idat = chunk(b'IDAT', zlib.compress(raw))
    iend = chunk(b'IEND', b'')
    return sig + ihdr + idat + iend

# SOVEREIGN purple color
color = (88, 28, 135)  # #581C87

sizes = {
    'mdpi': 48,
    'hdpi': 72,
    'xhdpi': 96,
    'xxhdpi': 144,

}

res = f'{base}/sovereign_client/app/src/main/res'

for density, size in sizes.items():
    png = create_png(size, size, color)
    path = f'{res}/mipmap-{density}/ic_launcher.png'
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path), exist_ok=True)
    with open(path, 'wb') as f:
        f.write(png)
    print(f'Created {path} ({size}x{size})')

PYEOF

{"path": "/data/data/com.termux/files/home/sovereign_agent.sh", "content": "#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# SOVEREIGN Agent - watches input.txt and replies to output.txt

SOV_DIR="/sdcard/sovereign"
INPUT="$SOV_DIR/input.txt"
OUTPUT="$SOV_DIR/output.txt"
STATUS="$SOV_DIR/status.txt"

# Set status online
echo "online" > "$STATUS"

echo "🤖 SOVEREIGN Agent running..."
echo "Watching: $INPUT"

while true; do
    # Check if input has content
    if [ -s "$INPUT" ]; then
        MSG=$(cat "$INPUT" | tr -d '\n' | head -c 500)
        echo "" > "$INPUT"  # Clear input

        echo "📥 Received: $MSG"

        # Simple response logic
        case "$MSG" in
            *halo*|*hai*|*hi*|*hello*|*bro*|*broo*|*woi*)
                REPLY="Yo! Gue SOVEREIGN 🤖\nAda yang bisa gue bantu?"
                ;;
            *status*|*cek*)
                UPTIME=$(uptime | sed 's/.*up //' | sed 's/,.*//')
                MEM=$(free -h 2>/dev/null | grep Mem | awk '{print $3"/"$2}' || echo "N/A")
                REPLY="📊 STATUS SYSTEM\n\n⏰ Uptime: $UPTIME\n💾 RAM: $MEM\n📁 Storage: $(df -h /sdcard 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | awk '{print $3"/"$2" used"}' || echo "N/A")\n✅ Agent: Online"
                ;;
            *help*)
                REPLY="📋 COMMANDS:\n\n• status - Cek sistem\n• help - Tampilkan ini\n• ls - Lihat file\n• whoami - Siapa gue\n• waktu - Jam sekarang\n• atau ketik apa aja, gue respon!"
                ;;
            *whoami*)
                REPLY="🤖 Gue SOVEREIGN v2.5\n📱 Android AI Agent\n⚡ Running on Termux"
                ;;
            *waktu*|*jam*|*time*)
                REPLY="🕐 Jam sekarang: $(date '+%H:%M:%S %d/%m/%Y')"
                ;;
            *ls*)
                REPLY="📂 File di /sdcard/sovereign:\n$(ls -la $SOV_DIR/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v total | awk '{print $NF}')"
                ;;
            *)
                REPLY="🤖 PESAN DITERIMA:\n\"$MSG\"\n\nMaaf gue masih versi simple. Ketik *help* buat lihat command yang tersedia."
                ;;
        esac

        # Write response
        echo -e "$REPLY" > "$OUTPUT"
        echo "📤 Replied: $(echo -e "$REPLY" | head -1)"
    fi

    sleep 1
done
"}
